message:
feat(fcp-host): add Unknown variant to fcp-test-connector FixtureArchetype

Add FixtureArchetype::Unknown for spawning a generic test connector
without implying a specific communication pattern. Default from unset
env var changes from RequestResponse to Unknown. Refactor from_env()
into from_env_value(Option<&str>) for testability. Add 3 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
